interaction.deposit: transfer USDT to the KNT contract; keeper scans the USDT Transfer event and calls processUsdtDeposit(account, amount, depositId, ...)
interaction.referral: Admin can setReferralSignalAmount(N); A transfers N KNT to B, then B transfers N KNT to A, binding B under A. bindReferrer(A) is also supported.
interaction.burnQueue: transfer KNT to 0x000000000000000000000000000000000000dEaD or call burnAndQueue(amount)
interaction.rewards: users do not call claim(); keeper distributes pending rewards during processUsdtDeposit(...) or keeperDistributeRewards(accounts)
